text:
Ben's knives (ベンズナイフ, Benzu Naifu) are the knives made by Benny Delon after every murder he committed. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 85 

Appearance

Every Ben's knife is engraved with a number corresponding to when it was made in relation to the other knives. The form of the blade apparently makes it possible to recognize some of its properties (such as toxicity), while the sharpness may indicate in which period of the blacksmith's activity the knife was forged. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 98 

Background

There are 288 different Ben's knives in total. The serial killer and blacksmith Benny Delon forged a unique knife for each victim he killed, showing that he had 288 victims. He put the knives up for sale in his storefront alongside his regular swords and other ordinary knives. 

Abilities

Ben's knives are known to be exceptionally sharp, enough to cut Silva Zoldyck's tough skin. At least one of them is imbued with a toxin so powerful that 0.1 mg of it can paralyze a whale. The aura of their forger remains in them about a century after his death. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Gon and Killua discovered that these knives can be found by using Gyo to detect the aura Benny Delon unknowingly left on them. Killua explains that the knives are undervalued because of their creator's criminal history, but describes them as masterpieces that have their keen collectors. At the present time, the prices of the knives vary depending on the incised numbers, but each of them can be sold for at least 5 million. 

Later, Chrollo uses a mid-era Ben's knife during his fight against Silva and Zeno, cutting the former's skin and forcing him to use a makeshift tourniquet to slow the poison. 

Trivia

According to Killua, his father is an admirer of the knives. 

Intertextuality and References

In chapter 6 of the Me & Roboco manga, Bondo's mother is seen holding a Ben's knife (the same model Chrollo used).
And again in chapter 109
It makes its formal anime debut in Episode 6 of the Me & Roboco Anime.
